findings.detail: Only 1 template option, so it feels like I have almost no choice for my site.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a few more template options so I can compare different looks quickly.

findings.detail: The design choices look limited overall, with just 3 color palettes.
findings.proposed_solution: Offer more palette choices or simple style presets that match wellness businesses.

findings.detail: It’s not clear up front what I’m supposed to do first in the editor.
findings.proposed_solution: Add a clear first-step prompt like 'Start here: pick a look, then edit your text.'

findings.detail: Chat is there, but I’d want it to feel more like a helpful guide instead of another thing to figure out.
findings.proposed_solution: Make the chat feel more guided, with examples of what it can help me change.

warnings.detail: Only 1 template option, so it feels like I have almost no choice for my site.
The design choices look limited overall, with just 3 color palettes.
It’s not clear up front what I’m supposed to do first in the editor.
Chat is there, but I’d want it to feel more like a helpful guide instead of another thing to figure out.
